# `CreatePointer`

**Systems:** MOS6502  
**Parameters:** `b,b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>CreatePointer( [byte hi], [byte lo] );</h3>
<ul>
<li>[byte hi] - high byte value</li>
<li>[byte lo] - low byte value</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Creates a pointer from (hi byte, lo byte).</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
var p:pointer;

i:=CreatePointer($04, b); // Creates a pointer to $0400 + the value in "b"
</code>


</div>
